headline: The footer build layer now stays quieter by default and opens only when support context is actually needed.
notes: Turns the footer build rail into a compact support rail that stays collapsed by default and opens only when the user wants build context or note links.
Keeps build notes and send-note actions close to the product without making the main pages feel like internal tooling surfaces.
Retunes the launch copy so the main entry layer feels more editorial and city-first, with support phrasing staying available but less foregrounded.
